title: T1 Engine: reap re-verifies from the war game's own checks, not the worker's word
prompt: Read and execute the war game at backlog/wargames/T1-15-independent-reverify-at-reap.md move by move. Add a 'wargame' verifier that runs each ticket's own ## Verification block at reap and cross-checks the worker's self-report; on any failure signal apply the counter-move; on any abort condition stop and write needs-decision/.
verify: A ticket with a deliberately-unmet negative check reaps as failed(verify) not done; existing generic/constellation verifiers still pass; no worker artifact modified by the reap step.
